name: slow_seq_scan_case
description: Large sequential scan on users table with selective email filter and no supporting index.

input.sql_query: SELECT id, email, created_at FROM users WHERE email = 'alice@example.com';
input.explain_plan:
Seq Scan on users  (cost=0.00..18342.00 rows=1 width=48) (actual time=0.120..412.345 rows=1 loops=1)
  Filter: ((email)::text = 'alice@example.com'::text)
  Rows Removed by Filter: 999999
Planning Time: 0.250 ms
Execution Time: 412.410 ms
input.index_definitions: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_pkey ON users (id);
input.notes: Query is expected to return a single row quickly.
